content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM from autonomous agents) can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent long-term memory, where only unexpected, unresolved information that triggers intrinsic curiosity gets retained in fast-access working memory, while predictable, low-surprise details are offloaded to long-term archival storage. This creates a self-organizing memory system that automatically aligns what an agent retains with what it still needs to learn for active sampling.
